1.0.1

Android Things Console CLI for devops operations

Usage: atconsole [command] [options]

Options:
  --version  Show version information
  --help     Show help information

Commands:
  apps       App related commands
  builds     Apps related commands
  imdisk     ImDisk related commands

Run 'atconsole [command] --help' for more information about a command.

Push a new version to an existing app

Usage: atconsole apps push [options] <Name> <AppPath>

Arguments:
  Name              The app name to be updated
  AppPath           The.apk to be uploaded

Options:
  --help            Show help information
  -v|--app-version  The new app version
  -i|--index        In case of multiple apps with the same name provide a index
                    to select one

commands.payload:
Push a new version to an existing app

Usage: atconsole apps push [options] <Name> <AppPath>

Arguments:
  Name              The app name to be updated
  AppPath           The.apk to be uploaded

Options:
  --help            Show help information
  -v|--app-version  The new app version
  -i|--index        In case of multiple apps with the same name provide a index
                    to select one

commands.payload:
Apps related commands

Usage: atconsole builds [command] [options]

Options:
  --help    Show help information

Commands:
  download  Download a specific build
  new       Create a new build
  pack      

Run 'builds [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Download a specific build

Usage: atconsole builds download [options] <Product> <Model> <TargetFile>

Arguments:
  Product       The product identifier, to get it copy and paste the
                https://partner.android.com/things/console/#/{your_code}/configure
                your_code place older from your product page in the url
  Model         The product model identifier
  TargetFile    The target file where move the donwload

Options:
  --help        Show help information
  -id           The app identifier
  -d|--date     Optional creatin date to be used as filter criteria
  -t|--tags     Tag list to be used as filter criteria, acept multiple values:
                -t MyTag1 -t MyTag2
  --production  Try to download a production image of a specific build
  -n|--name     Build configuration name

commands.payload:
Download a specific build

Usage: atconsole builds download [options] <Product> <Model> <TargetFile>

Arguments:
  Product       The product identifier, to get it copy and paste the
                https://partner.android.com/things/console/#/{your_code}/configure
                your_code place older from your product page in the url
  Model         The product model identifier
  TargetFile    The target file where move the donwload

Options:
  --help        Show help information
  -id           The app identifier
  -d|--date     Optional creatin date to be used as filter criteria
  -t|--tags     Tag list to be used as filter criteria, acept multiple values:
                -t MyTag1 -t MyTag2
  --production  Try to download a production image of a specific build
  -n|--name     Build configuration name

result.stdout:
Create a new build

Usage: atconsole builds new [options] <Product> <Model>

Arguments:
  Product                   The product identifier, to get it copy and paste the
                            https://partner.android.com/things/console/#/{your_code}/configure
                            your_code place older from your product page in the
                            url
  Model                     The product model identifier

Options:
  --help                    Show help information
  -a|--app-name             App name
  -v|--app-version          The app version to deploy with this build, the app
                            should exist in the app library
  -b|--boot-animation-path  Boot animation file path
  -p|--total-size           The totla image size in MB
  -o|--oem-size             Partititon total size
  --no-wait                 Not wait for build
  -n|--name                 Build configuration name

commands.payload:
Create a new build

Usage: atconsole builds new [options] <Product> <Model>

Arguments:
  Product                   The product identifier, to get it copy and paste the
                            https://partner.android.com/things/console/#/{your_code}/configure
                            your_code place older from your product page in the
                            url
  Model                     The product model identifier

Options:
  --help                    Show help information
  -a|--app-name             App name
  -v|--app-version          The app version to deploy with this build, the app
                            should exist in the app library
  -b|--boot-animation-path  Boot animation file path
  -p|--total-size           The totla image size in MB
  -o|--oem-size             Partititon total size
  --no-wait                 Not wait for build
  -n|--name                 Build configuration name

result.stdout:
Usage: atconsole builds pack [options] <ImagePath> <BootFilePath>

Arguments:
  ImagePath     The image file to be mounted, can be the original .zip file or
                the extracted .img file
  BootFilePath  A file in zip format with all the files to be deployed in the
                boot partition

Options:
  --help        Show help information
  -t            Target file where the image will be packaged
  --no-zip      If present, the image will not zip
